title: Se
sourceTitle: Turn These Reference Images Into Ultra Realistic
prompt:
Turn these reference images into an ultra-realistic cinematic short video.

Maintain the SAME identity, outfit, hairstyle, accessories, proportions, and facial features across every shot. Use the uploaded images strictly as continuity references.

SCENE/THEME:
[Describe the location, mood, and situation here.]

Examples:
late-night convenience store,
empty train station,
rainy street walk,
laundromat at 2AM,
fast food restaurant,
parking garage,
bedroom vlog,
airport waiting area,
rooftop at night,
quiet classroom after hours.

REALISM RULES:
no plastic skin,
no beauty filter look,
no hyper-sharp CGI details,
no fake cinematic perfection,
no unrealistic symmetry,
no over-stylized lighting,
no “AI influencer” appearance.

Skin must retain:
visible pores,
natural texture,
tiny blemishes,
under-eye darkness,
subtle facial asymmetry,
natural lip texture,
realistic oil reflections,
small imperfections.

MOVEMENT STYLE:
[Describe how the subject behaves.]

Examples:
tired and mentally distant,
awkward and quiet,
casual and distracted,
emotionally detached,
low-energy and reflective,
confident but natural,
messy candid behavior.

Movement must feel naturally human:
subtle blinking,
breathing motion,
tiny posture shifts,
awkward pauses,
slight hand fidgeting,
natural eye movement,
unplanned body language,
realistic walking and turning speed.

CAMERA STYLE:
captured on iPhone in low light,
handheld framing,
slight motion blur,
focus breathing,
minor autofocus mistakes,
low-light grain,
compression artifacts,
uneven exposure,
occasional softness,
natural lens imperfections.

SHOT IDEAS:
[Describe the moments you want.]

Examples:
checking phone while sitting alone,
mirror selfie,
walking past fluorescent lights,
standing outside in rain,
leaning against vending machine,
ordering food,
waiting quietly,
looking out window,
scrolling absentmindedly.

LIGHTING:
Use only realistic practical lighting from the environment such as:
fluorescent lights,
street lamps,
neon signs,
TV glow,
headlights,
bathroom lighting,
store signage,
window light.

COLOR:
muted realistic tones,
slight sensor noise,
natural white balance imperfections,
subtle highlight clipping,
realistic shadow falloff.

PACING:
slow observational pacing,
candid moments,
lingering silence,
nothing overly dramatic or over-directed.

The final result should feel like:
someone casually recorded a real person existing in a real environment late at night,
not an AI-generated influencer shoot.
